raw_sql:
SELECT category, state, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
GROUP BY category, state
ORDER BY category, state;
template:
SELECT category, state, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
GROUP BY category, state
ORDER BY category, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT department, 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS decline_rate_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amount,
       ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed')) AS avg_processed_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY declined DESC;
template:
SELECT department, 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / COUNT(*) AS decline_rate_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amount,
       ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_processed_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY declined DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT short_description, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Declined'
GROUP BY short_description
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
template:
SELECT short_description, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s
GROUP BY short_description
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT ci, 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY declined DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT ci, 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY declined DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%' OR ci ILIKE '%carry%' THEN 'Luggage/Bags'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR ci ILIKE '%latitude%' OR ci ILIKE '%thinkpad%' OR ci ILIKE '%computer%' THEN 'Laptops/Computers'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%gps%' OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%navigator%' OR ci ILIKE '%positioning%' THEN 'GPS Devices'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%car%' OR ci ILIKE '%transport%' THEN 'Transportation'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%charger%' OR ci ILIKE '%adapter%' OR ci ILIKE '%cable%' THEN 'Accessories'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%system%' OR ci ILIKE '%software%' OR ci ILIKE '%management%' THEN 'Software/Systems'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%kit%' OR ci ILIKE '%equipment%' THEN 'Equipment Kits'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS ci_type,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Pending') AS pending,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed')) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY ci_type
ORDER BY declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_type,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS pending,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*),?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY ci_type
ORDER BY declined DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%luggage%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suitcase%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bag%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%carry%'::text)) THEN 'Luggage/Bags'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%latitude%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%thinkpad%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%computer%'::text)) THEN 'Laptops/Computers'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%gps%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%garmin%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%navigator%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%positioning%'::text)) THEN 'GPS Devices'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%bus%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vehicle%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%car%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%transport%'::text)) THEN 'Transportation'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%charger%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%adapter%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%cable%'::text)) THEN 'Accessories'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%system%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%software%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%management%'::text)) THEN 'Software/Systems'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%kit%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%equipment%'::text)) THEN 'Equipment Kits'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '<1000'
    WHEN amount < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
    WHEN amount < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
    WHEN amount < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
    WHEN amount < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
    WHEN amount < 7000 THEN '6000-6999'
    ELSE '7000+'
  END AS amount_bucket,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY amount_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(amount);
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS amount_bucket,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY amount_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(amount);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (amount < 1000) THEN '<1000'::text WHEN (amount < 2000) THEN '1000-1999'::text WHEN (amount < 3000) THEN '2000-2999'::text WHEN (amount < 4000) THEN '3000-3999'::text WHEN (amount < 5000) THEN '4000-4999'::text WHEN (amount < 6000) THEN '5000-5999'::text WHEN (amount < 7000) THEN '6000-6999'::text ELSE '7000+'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS day_of_week,
  TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'Day') AS day_name,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY day_of_week, day_name
ORDER BY day_of_week;
template:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS day_of_week,
  TO_CHAR(opened_at, ?s) AS day_name,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY day_of_week, day_name
ORDER BY day_of_week;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  "user",
  department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')) AS total_resolved,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY "user", department
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')) >= 2
ORDER BY declined DESC, decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  "user",
  department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)) AS total_resolved,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY "user", department
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)) >= ?n
ORDER BY declined DESC, decline_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(source_id FROM 1 FOR 3) AS source_prefix,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed')) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY source_prefix
ORDER BY declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(source_id FROM ?n FOR ?n) AS source_prefix,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY source_prefix
ORDER BY declined DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/86400, 1) AS days_to_process,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state IN ('Declined', 'Processed') AND processed_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY days_to_process, state
ORDER BY days_to_process
LIMIT 30;
template:
SELECT 
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n, ?n) AS days_to_process,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s AND state IN (?s, ?s) AND processed_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY days_to_process, state
ORDER BY days_to_process
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (state = ANY ('{Declined,Processed}'::text[])) AND (category = 'Travel'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  COUNT(processed_date) AS has_processed_date,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/86400), 1) AS avg_days_to_process,
  MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/86400)::numeric(10,1) AS min_days,
  MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/86400)::numeric(10,1) AS max_days
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state IN ('Declined', 'Processed')
GROUP BY state;
template:
SELECT 
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  COUNT(processed_date) AS has_processed_date,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n), ?n) AS avg_days_to_process,
  MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric(?n,?n) AS min_days,
  MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric(?n,?n) AS max_days
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s AND state IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Pending','Submitted')) AS in_flight,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;
template:
SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)) AS in_flight,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%travel%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%luggage%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%suitcase%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%bag%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%bus%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%vehicle%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%car%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%flight%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%hotel%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%gps%'
  AND ci NOT ILIKE '%garmin%'
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
  AND ci NOT ILIKE ?s
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY declined DESC;

predicates: ((ci !~~* '%travel%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%luggage%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%suitcase%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%bag%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%bus%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%vehicle%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%car%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%flight%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%hotel%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%gps%'::text) AND (ci !~~* '%garmin%'::text) AND (category = 'Travel'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%dell%' OR ci ILIKE '%hp %' OR ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR ci ILIKE '%elitebook%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%headphone%' OR ci ILIKE '%bose%' OR ci ILIKE '%vpn%' OR ci ILIKE '%virtual private%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%satellite phone%' OR ci ILIKE '%passport controller%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%charger%' OR ci ILIKE '%adapter%'
    THEN 'Non-Travel IT/Electronics'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%' OR ci ILIKE '%carry%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%tumi%' OR ci ILIKE '%samsonite%' OR ci ILIKE '%briefcase%'
    THEN 'Luggage/Bags'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%jet%' OR ci ILIKE '%boeing%' OR ci ILIKE '%suv%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%flight%' OR ci ILIKE '%airline%' OR ci ILIKE '%corporate%'
    THEN 'Corporate Transport'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%travel%'
    THEN 'Travel-labeled CI'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%gps%' OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%navigator%' OR ci ILIKE '%positioning%'
    THEN 'GPS/Navigation'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%kit%' OR ci ILIKE '%equipment%'
    THEN 'Equipment Kits'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%system%' OR ci ILIKE '%software%' OR ci ILIKE '%management%'
    THEN 'Software/Systems'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS ci_category,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed')) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY ci_category
ORDER BY declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_category,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY ci_category
ORDER BY declined DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%dell%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hp %'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%elitebook%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%headphone%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bose%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vpn%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%virtual private%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%satellite phone%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%passport controller%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%charger%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%adapter%'::text)) THEN 'Non-Travel IT/Electronics'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%suitcase%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%luggage%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bag%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%carry%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%tumi%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%samsonite%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%briefcase%'::text)) THEN 'Luggage/Bags'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%bus%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%jet%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%boeing%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suv%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vehicle%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%flight%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%airline%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%corporate%'::text)) THEN 'Corporate Transport'::text WHEN (ci ~~* '%travel%'::text) THEN 'Travel-labeled CI'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%gps%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%garmin%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%navigator%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%positioning%'::text)) THEN 'GPS/Navigation'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%kit%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%equipment%'::text)) THEN 'Equipment Kits'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%system%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%software%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%management%'::text)) THEN 'Software/Systems'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Declined') AS travel_declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Processed') AS travel_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Assets') AS assets_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Services') AS services_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Miscellaneous') AS misc_cnt
FROM flag_20
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Declined') > 0
   AND (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != 'Travel') > 0)
ORDER BY travel_declined DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s) AS travel_declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s) AS travel_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s) AS assets_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s) AS services_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s) AS misc_cnt
FROM flag_20
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s) > ?n
   AND (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != ?s) > ?n)
ORDER BY travel_declined DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%dell%' OR ci ILIKE '%hp %' OR ci ILIKE '%elitebook%' OR ci ILIKE '%thinkpad%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%latitude%' OR ci ILIKE '%optiplex%' OR ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR ci ILIKE '%desktop%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%server%' OR ci ILIKE '%printer%' OR ci ILIKE '%monitor%' OR ci ILIKE '%keyboard%'
    THEN 'Hardware (belongs in Assets)'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%software%' OR ci ILIKE '%system%' OR ci ILIKE '%aws%' OR ci ILIKE '%cloud%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%vpn%' OR ci ILIKE '%virtual private%' OR ci ILIKE '%management system%'
    THEN 'Software/Services (belongs in Services)'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%travel%' OR ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%carry%' OR ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%jet%' OR ci ILIKE '%boeing%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%airline%' OR ci ILIKE '%flight%' OR ci ILIKE '%hotel%' OR ci ILIKE '%gps%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%tumi%' OR ci ILIKE '%samsonite%' OR ci ILIKE '%suv%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%corporate%'
    THEN 'Genuine Travel Item'
    ELSE 'Ambiguous'
  END AS ci_classification,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY ci_classification, state
ORDER BY ci_classification, state;

         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_classification,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY ci_classification, state
ORDER BY ci_classification, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed')) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
  AND (
    ci ILIKE '%travel%' OR ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%carry%' OR ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%jet%' OR ci ILIKE '%boeing%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%airline%' OR ci ILIKE '%flight%' OR ci ILIKE '%hotel%' OR ci ILIKE '%gps%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%tumi%' OR ci ILIKE '%samsonite%' OR ci ILIKE '%suv%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%corporate%'
  )
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')) > 0
ORDER BY declined DESC
LIMIT 25;

  ci,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_processed_amt
FROM flag_20

  AND (

    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s

    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
  )

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  f.user,
  f.department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category = 'Travel' AND f.state = 'Declined') AS travel_declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category = 'Travel' AND f.state = 'Processed') AS travel_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category != 'Travel' AND f.state = 'Processed') AS other_cat_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category != 'Travel' AND f.state = 'Declined') AS other_cat_declined
FROM flag_20 f
WHERE f.user IN (
  SELECT "user" FROM flag_20
  WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Declined'
  GROUP BY "user"
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
GROUP BY f.user, f.department
ORDER BY travel_declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  f.user,
  f.department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category = ?s AND f.state = ?s) AS travel_declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category = ?s AND f.state = ?s) AS travel_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category != ?s AND f.state = ?s) AS other_cat_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.category != ?s AND f.state = ?s) AS other_cat_declined
FROM flag_20 f
WHERE f.user IN (
  SELECT "user" FROM flag_20
  WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s
  GROUP BY "user"
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
)
GROUP BY f.user, f.department
ORDER BY travel_declined DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  f."user",
  f.category,
  f.state,
  f.ci,
  f.amount,
  CASE 
    WHEN f.ci ILIKE '%dell%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%hp %' OR f.ci ILIKE '%elitebook%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%thinkpad%'
         OR f.ci ILIKE '%latitude%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%desktop%'
    THEN 'Hardware'
    WHEN f.ci ILIKE '%software%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%system%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%vpn%' OR f.ci ILIKE '%cloud%'
    THEN 'Software'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS ci_type
FROM flag_20 f
WHERE f."user" IN (
  SELECT "user" FROM flag_20
  WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state = 'Declined'
  GROUP BY "user" HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
ORDER BY f."user", f.category, f.state;

         OR f.ci ILIKE ?s OR f.ci ILIKE ?s OR f.ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN f.ci ILIKE ?s OR f.ci ILIKE ?s OR f.ci ILIKE ?s OR f.ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_type
FROM flag_20 f
WHERE f."user" IN (
  SELECT "user" FROM flag_20
  WHERE category = ?s AND state = ?s
  GROUP BY "user" HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
)
ORDER BY f."user", f.category, f.state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%dell%' OR ci ILIKE '%hp %' OR ci ILIKE '%elitebook%' OR ci ILIKE '%thinkpad%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%latitude%' OR ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR ci ILIKE '%desktop%' OR ci ILIKE '%optiplex%'
    THEN 'Hardware/IT Asset'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%travel%' OR ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%carry%' OR ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%jet%' OR ci ILIKE '%boeing%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%airline%' OR ci ILIKE '%flight%' OR ci ILIKE '%hotel%' OR ci ILIKE '%gps%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%tumi%' OR ci ILIKE '%samsonite%' OR ci ILIKE '%suv%'
         OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%charger%' OR ci ILIKE '%adapter%' OR ci ILIKE '%headphone%'
    THEN 'Travel/Accessories'
    WHEN ci ILIKE '%software%' OR ci ILIKE '%system%' OR ci ILIKE '%vpn%' OR ci ILIKE '%cloud%' OR ci ILIKE '%aws%'
    THEN 'Software/Systems'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS ci_type,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT department, ', ' ORDER BY department) AS departments
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel' AND state IN ('Declined', 'Processed')
GROUP BY ci_type, state
ORDER BY ci_type, state;
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_type,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT department, ?s ORDER BY department) AS departments
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s AND state IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY ci_type, state
ORDER BY ci_type, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  "user",
  ci,
  COUNT(*) AS submission_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  MIN(opened_at)::date AS first_submission,
  MAX(opened_at)::date AS last_submission,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY "user", ci
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY submission_count DESC, declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  "user",
  ci,
  COUNT(*) AS submission_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  MIN(opened_at)::date AS first_submission,
  MAX(opened_at)::date AS last_submission,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY "user", ci
HAVING COUNT(*) > ?n
ORDER BY submission_count DESC, declined DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '<1000'
    WHEN amount < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
    WHEN amount < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
    WHEN amount < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
    WHEN amount < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
    WHEN amount < 7000 THEN '6000-6999'
    ELSE '7000+'
  END AS amount_bucket,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
  AND (
    ci ILIKE '%travel%' OR ci ILIKE '%suitcase%' OR ci ILIKE '%luggage%' OR ci ILIKE '%bag%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%carry%' OR ci ILIKE '%bus%' OR ci ILIKE '%jet%' OR ci ILIKE '%boeing%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%airline%' OR ci ILIKE '%flight%' OR ci ILIKE '%hotel%' OR ci ILIKE '%gps%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%garmin%' OR ci ILIKE '%tumi%' OR ci ILIKE '%samsonite%' OR ci ILIKE '%suv%'
    OR ci ILIKE '%vehicle%' OR ci ILIKE '%charger%' OR ci ILIKE '%adapter%' OR ci ILIKE '%headphone%'
  )
GROUP BY amount_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(amount);
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS amount_bucket,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
  AND (
    ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
  )
GROUP BY amount_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(amount);

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN short_description ILIKE '%automatically generated%' OR short_description ILIKE '%auto%generated%'
    THEN 'Auto-Generated'
    ELSE 'Manually Entered'
  END AS submission_type,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY submission_type, state
ORDER BY submission_type, state;

         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
         OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS ci_type,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY department, ci_type
ORDER BY department, ci_type;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%dell%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hp %'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%elitebook%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%thinkpad%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%latitude%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%desktop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%optiplex%'::text)) THEN 'Hardware/IT Asset'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%travel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suitcase%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%luggage%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bag%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%carry%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bus%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%jet%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%boeing%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%airline%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%flight%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hotel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%gps%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%garmin%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%tumi%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%samsonite%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suv%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vehicle%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%charger%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%adapter%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%headphone%'::text)) THEN 'Travel/Accessories'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%software%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%system%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vpn%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%cloud%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%aws%'::text)) THEN 'Software/Systems'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  department,
  ci,
  state,
  amount,
  short_description
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel' AND department = 'Development'
ORDER BY state, ci;
template:
SELECT 
  department,
  ci,
  state,
  amount,
  short_description
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s AND department = ?s
ORDER BY state, ci;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN short_description ILIKE '%business%' OR short_description ILIKE '%corporate%' 
         OR short_description ILIKE '%procurement%' OR short_description ILIKE '%remote work%'
         OR short_description ILIKE '%offsite%' OR short_description ILIKE '%conference%'
    THEN 'Business-Justified'
    WHEN short_description ILIKE '%automatically generated%' OR short_description ILIKE '%auto%'
         OR short_description ILIKE '%generated%' OR short_description ILIKE '%automated%'
    THEN 'Auto-Generated/Generic'
    WHEN short_description ILIKE '%asset%' OR short_description ILIKE '%registration%'
         OR short_description ILIKE '%entry%' OR short_description ILIKE '%record%'
    THEN 'Asset-Registration Language'
    ELSE 'Other Description'
  END AS desc_type,
  department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Processed') AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Declined','Processed')), 0), 1) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Declined')) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY desc_type, department
ORDER BY desc_type, declined DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s 
         OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
         OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
         OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
         OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s
    THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS desc_type,
  department,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS declined,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS processed,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) * ?n / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)), ?n), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(amount) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)) AS avg_declined_amt
FROM flag_20
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY desc_type, department
ORDER BY desc_type, declined DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%business%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%corporate%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%procurement%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%remote work%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%offsite%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%conference%'::text)) THEN 'Business-Justified'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%automatically generated%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%auto%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%generated%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%automated%'::text)) THEN 'Auto-Generated/Generic'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%asset%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%registration%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%entry%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%record%'::text)) THEN 'Asset-Registration Language'::text ELSE 'Other Description'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  f1."user",
  f1.ci,
  f1.amount,
  f1.category AS declined_category,
  f1.opened_at::date AS declined_date,
  f2.category AS other_category,
  f2.state AS other_state,
  f2.opened_at::date AS other_date,
  ABS(f1.amount - f2.amount) AS amount_diff
FROM flag_20 f1
JOIN flag_20 f2 
  ON f1."user" = f2."user"
  AND f1.number != f2.number
  AND ABS(f1.amount - f2.amount) <= 500
  AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f1.opened_at - f2.opened_at))/86400) <= 30
WHERE f1.category = 'Travel' AND f1.state = 'Declined'
  AND f2.category != 'Travel'
ORDER BY f1."user", f1.opened_at
LIMIT 25;
template:
SELECT 
  f1."user",
  f1.ci,
  f1.amount,
  f1.category AS declined_category,
  f1.opened_at::date AS declined_date,
  f2.category AS other_category,
  f2.state AS other_state,
  f2.opened_at::date AS other_date,
  ABS(f1.amount - f2.amount) AS amount_diff
FROM flag_20 f1
JOIN flag_20 f2 
  ON f1."user" = f2."user"
  AND f1.number != f2.number
  AND ABS(f1.amount - f2.amount) <= ?n
  AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f1.opened_at - f2.opened_at))/?n) <= ?n
WHERE f1.category = ?s AND f1.state = ?s
  AND f2.category != ?s
ORDER BY f1."user", f1.opened_at
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((f1.number <> f2.number) AND (abs((f1.amount - f2.amount)) <= 500) AND (abs((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (f1.opened_at - f2.opened_at)) / '86400'::numeric)) <= '30'::numeric))
